description_long: This is a classic round alarm clock with a bold red metal casing and two prominent bells on top, separated by a black hammer. The clock face is white with black Arabic numerals and thick black hour and minute hands, as well as a red second hand. The front features a glass or plastic cover protecting the face, while the back is solid red with no visible controls or battery compartment. The clock stands on two short black legs, giving it stability on flat surfaces. The side views reveal the depth of the casing and the protruding bells, emphasizing its traditional mechanical design. The overall appearance is robust and visually striking, making it a noticeable timepiece in any setting.
description: A bold red, round alarm clock with twin bells, black legs, and a white face with black numerals and hands. Its classic design is both functional and visually striking.
description_view_0: The front view shows the clock face with black Arabic numerals, three hands, and the twin bells on top.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the depth of the clock, the protruding bell, and the cylindrical hammer between the bells.
description_view_2: The back view displays a solid red surface with no visible controls or openings, and the two black legs at the bottom.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the bell and the hammer, emphasizing the clock's symmetrical design.
attribute_face_design: Circular white face with bold black Arabic numerals, thick black hands, and a red second hand, all enclosed by a red bezel.
